description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for DeFiCh/go-ethlibs that runs on push to master, pull requests to master, and workflow dispatch. The workflow should have two jobs: build-binaries and node-rpc-tests. The build-binaries job should build binaries using make.sh and upload them as an artifact. The node-rpc-tests job should download the binaries, run a defid node, push fixtures, set up Go, and run EVM RPC tests using go test.
